prompt: The window does not close when the X button is clicked. What is the bug?
choices: JFrame.setVisible(true) must be called on the EDT
The default close operation is DO_NOTHING_ON_CLOSE; clicking X does nothing at all
The default close operation for JFrame is HIDE_ON_CLOSE; the window is hidden but the JVM keeps running; to terminate the application call frame.setDefaultCloseOperation(JFrame.EXIT_ON_CLOSE)
JFrame requires a WindowListener to handle close events
explanation: JFrame's default close operation is HIDE_ON_CLOSE. Clicking X hides the window but does not exit the JVM — the application keeps running invisibly. Fix: call frame.setDefaultCloseOperation(JFrame.EXIT_ON_CLOSE) to terminate the JVM when the window is closed.
